productDisplayName: Lee Men's Hentry Smoke Grey T-shirt
description: CompositionGrey round neck t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed neckline and in-seam, half sleeves with brand embroidery on left sleeve and graphic camoflauge print on the frontFittingComfortWash care Machine wash in cold water inside out Wash dark colours separately Use mild detergent Do not bleach or wring Tumble dry or flat dry inside out in shade Warm iron Do not iron on print/embellishments From dust to the stars, Henry David lee has made his garment company lee grow to magnanimous heights, which is still a favoured brand even after more than a century. The camouflage print with screen print lettering on the front adds to this tee a rugged ranch feel. Team this cotton t-shirt from Lee with jeans and sports shoes or sandals for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6.2'', Shoulders-16"
